Chuin Paul Areopagus lailunga adingin, hiche thu hi aseiye, “Nangho Athens miho, imalam jouseah nangho hi hou ngaisah tah nahiuve ti kahedoh-e.
Ijeh-inem itile nahouho chengseu kavetlea kahile, ‘Hetphah lou pathen ding,’ tia kisun maicham khat kamui. Hijeh a chu nanghon het louva nahoujiu chu keiman nangho kaseidoh peh nahiuve.
Vannoi leisetle asunga thil um jouse sema Pathen chu van le lei Pakai ahin, khut’a kisa hou-inah achengpoi;
chule ngaichat neiya banga, mihem khut’a jenle jong ahipoi; amatah imajouse hinnale haina peale ijakai pejoh ahibouve;
chule leiset chung jouse losoh a cheng dingin, khat’a konin vannoi mi chitin namtin asemin, amaho chu phat ateppeh in, achennau jong gamgi asepeh-e.
amahon Pathen aholuva amai amaiyuva ijem tia amudoh theina dingun; ahinla ama chu eiho koimacha a konin aum gamlapoi.
Ijeh-inem itile eiho amaa hinga chatloh a, chule uma ihiuve; nangho lah a thuchih chomsun themho lah a koi koiham jengin jong, ‘Eiho jong ama son ihiuve,’ tin aseiyuve.
Pathen son ihi jeh-uva chu Pathen chu mihem lung suhtoa sana, dangka, song kikheng milim tobanga ingaito ding dolu ahipoi.
Ihet lou laiyu chu Pathen in einavet thimu ahin; tu vang in gam jousea mi jousen alung aheina dinga thu apen ahitai;
aman nikho khat atep ahin, hiche ni chule ami tun chun chondihnaa vannoi hi athu atan ding ahi; ama chu athia kona akaithouva mi jouse ahet kichensah ahitai,” ati.
Athi thokit thudol ajah phat’un abangin anuisat tauvin ahi; chule adangho vang chun, “Hiche thudol hi nanga konin ngai kitnau vinge,” atiuvin ahi.
Hiti chun Paul amaho lah a kon chun apotdoh tai.
Ahinla mi kimkhat ama henga akaiyun atahsan tauve. Amaho lah a chun Areopagus mi Dionysius le numei khat amin Damaris atiutoh chule adang dangho jong ahiuve.
Chuche nung chun Paul in Athens a konin apotdoh-in, Corinth a achetai.

Hiche lai chun Claudius-in Juda ho jouse aboncha Rome a kona potdoh dinga thu apeh jeh a ainnepipi Priscilla toh Italy gama kona hung lhungtil Pontus gama peng Judah mi khat amin Aquila chu amun amani henga chun achei.
Amani chu akiveina lhon amatoh thakhat ahi lhon jeh chun amani koma chun alhungin na atong khomjiuve; akiveinau chu amaho chu pon in sem mi ahiuve.
Chule cholngah niseh le kikhopna ah thu asuhtopin Judaho le Greek miho chu atahsan dingin ajol lutjin ahi.
Chuin Silas le Timothy Macedonia gama kona ahung lhunsuh lhon phat chun, Paul thu hillam jenga akipen, Jesu chu Christa ahi, ti Juda ho chu ahettoh sahna ahiltan ahi.
Ahivangin amahon adoudal un, ataitom un ahile, Paul in apon athingin ajah-uva, “Nangho thisan nangho lu chungah chuhen; kei kangime; tu kalin chidang namdang ho henga chetange,” ati.
Chuin chua kon chun achen Pathen ngaisahtah amin Titus Justus atiu ina chun aluttai; ama in chu kikhopna inkom chu ahi;
chuin kikhopna in vaipo Crispus chun ainsung mi jouse toh Pakai atahsan tai; chuin Corinth miho lah a mi atama tam in ajauvin atahsan un baptize achangtauve.
Chuin jan in Pakaiyin Paul akimusah-in, “Nangma kicha hih-in; thu sei jing jengin; umthim hih-in;
keiman nangma kaumpi jingnai, chule suhset dinga koiman nabulu lou ding ahi; ijeh-inem itile hiche khopi sunga hin mi tamtah kaneiye,” ati.
Chuin ama amaho lah a chun kum khat le kumkeh aumin, Pathen thu ahiltai.
Ahin Gallio chu Achaia a gamvaipo ahi laiyin Juda ho lung khat akisauvin Paul bolnan akipatdoh-un, thutanna mun ah akaiyun.
“Hichepa hin chonna dan ngailouva Pathen hou dingin miho ajol lhai,” atiuve.
Chuin Paul pao ding akigotle Gallio chun Judaho jah a, “Vo Judaho, hiche hi suhkhel ahim khan gitlou thu ahim hile, keiman nami hehnau kangaipeh ding nahiuvin;
thu mai maile min mai mai ahiloule, nangho chonna danthu kibaona mai mai ahivangle, chutobang thutan hiding kanompoi” ati.
Chuin amaho chu thutanna muna kon chun anodohtai.
Hichun abon chauvin kikhopna in vaipoi Sosthenes chu amanun, thutanna maitah a avotauve. Ahivangin hitiho ima chu Gallio’n donin aneipoi.
Chuin Paul chukoma chun sottah aumin, sopitetoh akilhan Syria gam lama kongin akitoltai; Priscilla le Aquila chutoh akilhone. Paul in kitepna anei jeh-in Cenchreae ah asam avouvin ahi.
Chuin Ephesus khopi alhun un amani chu chukoma chun adalhatai; ama vang chu kikhopna inah alut’in Juda ho chu thu asuhtopitai.
Chuin chukoma chu um sot jep dingin alhouvin ahile ama anom hih-in,
akilhadoh-in, “Pathen lunggot lam ahile nahenguva hung kitnange,” atin. Ephesus kho adalhan kongin akitoltai.
Chuin Caesarea ah akumin achetouvin Houbung chu salam agapen Antioch a ahung kilesuh kittai.
Chukoma chun chom khat aumin chua kon chun Galatia le Phrygia gam ajotpeh-in seijuiho jouse aphutdet letai.
Hiche lai chun amin Apollos atiu Judah mi Alexandria a peng ahin, thuseiya themtah le Pathen lekhabua thua hattah ahin;
ama chu Pakai lampi thu kihila ahin, alungin agunchu lheh jengin, Jesu umchan thudol kichehtah-in aseiyin, ahivangin John baptize jengbou chu ahet ahi.
Chuin kikhopna inah hakattah-in thu asei pan tan ahi; chuin Priscilla le Aquila’n athuhil chu aja lhonin, ainah apui lhonin Pathen lampi thu chu dihtah in ahilchen lhontai.
Chuin ama chu Achaia gama ache nomtan ahile sopihon atilkhouvun, chuin ama chu anasanna dingun seijuiho hengah lekha asuntauve. Chukom alhunin lungsetna vangin atahsanho phatna tamtah abolin ahi.
Ijeh inem itile Jesu chu Christa ahi, ti chu aman Pathen lekhabua konin aphottohna avetsah-in hakattah-in japi ang sungah Juda ho anelkhup dengtan ahi.
Chuin ahitin ahi, Apollos Corinth khopia aum pet chun Paul in sahgam lam achonlen Ephesus ahung lhungin ahile seijui phabep amun ajah-uva,
“Natahsanuva chu Lhagao Theng nachannah-uvem,” tin adongin ahile, amahon ajah a, “Lhagao Theng aume ti jong kajapouve,” atiuve.
Chuin aman, “Ahile ipiaba baptize changa nahiuvem?” atile, amahon, “John baptize chanin,” atiuve.
Chuin Paul in, “John in miho jah a chu, ‘Kanunga hunga Jesu chu tahsan un,’ atia lung heina dinga baptize achansah ahibouve,” ati.
Chuin thu hiche chu ajah phat’un Pakai Jesu minah baptize achang tauve.
Chuin Paul in achunguvah akhut angam in ahile Lhagao Theng achunguva achutai; chuti chun paotin pao tangin thu aseiyun, lhagao thu jong aseidoh tauvin ahi.
Amaho chu a bonchauvin mi somle ni ahiuve.
Chutah chun Paul kikhopna inah alut’in kicha louhelin lha thum geiyin thu ahilin amaho chu Pathen gam thudol asuhtopin ajolluttai.
Ahivangin mi kimkhat alouchala thua anun louva mipi angsunga chuche Lam chu aseiset phat’un, aman amaho chu adalhan seijuiho chu atum huiyin Tyrannus school’ah niseh-in akihoulim pitai.
Hitichun kum ni aumin ahile Asia gama cheng jousen, Judah mi jong, Greek mi jongin, Pakai thu chu aja sohkei tauve.
Pathen in Paul khut’a thil kidang mainah abolsahpoi;
chuti chun ati chung a konin ultheh hijongle pon hijongle alauvin adamlou henga apojiuvin ahile, ahiveiyun adalha jeng adalha jengun lhagao bohho jong chu apotdoh jengji tauve.
Chuin Judah vahvei doithema kivei koi koiham in lhagao boh vopteho chunga Jesu min apanun. Paul in athu ahil Jesu mina thu kapeh nahi, ti pat dingin agouvin ahi.
Chutia bola chu Judah thempu pipui Sceva chate pasal sagi ahiuve.
Ahivangin lhagao boh chun adonbut’in, “Keiman Jesu kahenai chule Paul jong kahenai, nanghobou hi koi nahiuvem” ati.
Chuin lhagao boh voppa chu achomin amaho mi ni chunga achun anilhon chun athajouvin akop lhon chun ajoutai, chuti chun chuche ina kon chun asagoh keole mapun ajamdoh tauve.
Chuin hichu Ephesus a cheng mi jousen, Judah min jong, Greek min jong ahe soh keitauve; chule abonchauva chungah kichat achutan, chule Pakai Jesu min choisangin aumtan ahi.
Atahsan ho jong tamtah ahungun athilbolu aseidoh-un aphongdoh tauve.
Chule doichoi ho tamtah-in jong alekhabu chengseu ahinchoi khomun agouvam un; chuin aman asuhtoule dangka sang som nga ahi ti aheuve.
Chuti chun thahattah-in akhangtouvin Pakai thu chun ajoutai.
Chuin chucheng thu kichai jou chun Paul in Macedonia le Achaia gam chu chotsoh a Jerusalem a che ding lung agon, “Chua kache jou chule Rome gavenge,” ati.
Chuti chun alhacha teni, Timothy le Erastus chu Macedonia gama asolin, ama Asia gamah chomkhat aumdene.
Hiche lai vel chun chuche Lampi thudola chun thunoh mainah asohpoi.
Ajeh chu amin Demetrius atiu dangka kheng mi khat aumin ama chun dangkan Diana hou-in lim akhengin khut themho ding chun kiveina phabepcha aumdoh sahpoi.
Chuin ama chun amaho chu chutobang natongho chengsetoh akou khomin ajah-uva, “Miho, hichea ikiveiyu hi ihaodoh nau ahi, nanghon naheuve.
Chule Ephesus goh hilouva Asia gam pumpia hiche mihempa Paul hin, ‘Miho khut’a kisema chu Pathen ahi hihhel e,’ tia ajola miho tamtah ahei manggam hi mu jong namuvin, he jong naheuve.

Hichea hin ikiveinau manlou ahungso ding kichat umjenggoh ahipoi; pathenlennu Diana hou-in jong nahsahmoa hung kibola chule Asia gam pumpiale vannoiyin ahou amanu jeng jong hi alet aloupinaa kona hung kiloilha khong ding ahi,” ati.
Chuin chuche thu ajah tah un, alunghang behseh jengun, “Ephesus mite, Diana alene!” tin asam asam jengun ahi.
Chuti chun akho thingin akilohsoh jengun, Gaius le Aristarchus Macedonia gam mi, Paul akholjin na a alhonpi teni chu amanun, thakhat tah-in tot bolna inah alhailutpi jengui.
Chuin Paul miho lah a chu lut ding akigon ahile seijuihon achesah pouve.
Chuin Asia gam mi akihoutheipi hon mi ahinsolun, tot bolna ina chu gakilulah louhel dingin akham lheh lheh jengun ahi.
Chuin akikhomho chu aboilailai jengun mi atam jon akikhop’u chu ajeh ahepouve; hijeh chun kimkhat in thu khat asamun, kimkhat’in thu chom asamun ahi.
Chuin mipi lah a kon chun Alexander ahinkaidoh un ahile Juda hon malama asonui. Chuin Alexander’in mipi lama chun akhut ajah-in akihonna thu sei akigon ahi.
Ahivangin ama chu Judah mi ahi aheuvin, “Ephesus te Diana alene!” atiuvin; hichu nidan ni geijenin asam asam jengun ahi.
Chuin khosung thusunpa chun mipi chu aphoh thip’in, “Vo Ephesus mite, Ephesus khopiho Diana lenle Jupiter a kona hunglha a hou milim hou-in-ngah ahi hi, miho lah a koi ahelou umam?
Chuti chu ahin hicheng hi seitoi thei ahilou het’a thipbeh-a naum dingu, chule thu doptoh louva ima nabol lou dingu thu ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile nanghon nahinkaiyu miho hi hou-in choma jong ahipouvin eiho pathennu seisea taitoma jong ahipouve.
Demetrius le atohpi khut themhon mi koiham chunga thu aneiyule kihehna in honsan aume, chule gamvaipoho jong aumnauve; hikoma khun gakiheh tauhen.
Thu dang ima naholu ahivangle angaiya kikhopna a leltoh ding ahi.
Tunia thunoh so thua hi, ajeh bei ahi jeh-a hi, ichunguva thu ahung um ding kichat aume; hiche ikikhoplo penu hiche hi ahi, tia idonbut thei lou dingu ahi,” ati.
chuin hichu aseiyin miho chu alhadoh tai.
Chuin thunoh chu akichai jouvin Paul in seijuiho chu agakousah-in, akikhenpin, Macedonia gama dingin achetai.
Chuin chuche gamkai sungse chu achonsoh-in amaho chu thu tamtah-in atilkhouvin, Greek gam alhungtai.
Chuin chukoma chu lhathum atham jouvin Syria gam lama konga kitola che ding agotle Juda hon achanlhih jeh-un, Macedonia jotpai ago kittan ahi.
Chuin Asia gam geiyin Beroea khoa Pyrrhus chapa Sopater, Thessalonica, Aristarchus le Secundus, Derbe khoa Gaius le Timothy, Asia gama Tychicus le Trophimus hicheng chun alhonpiuve.
Hiteho chu keiho masangah anacheuvin Troas khoah einangah jingui.
Keiho vang chu cholsolou changlhah kut jouvin Philippi a konin kongin kakitolun ninga nin Troas khoah ahengu kalhungui. Chua chun nisagi kanichonui.
Chuin hapta kipat ni masanin changlhah hehbal dingin kakikhomun ahile. Paul in ajinga che ding akigot jeh-in amaho chu akihoulimpin, khangkim geiyin sottah thu aseiye.
Kakikhopnau indan chungnunga chu meivah tamtah uma ahi.
Chuin bangkot’a tou gollhang khat amin Eutychus ahin, ana-ihmu lhutai; Paul in athusei aseisot jeh chun anaihmulhun, chung dan thumna a konin noi lamah alhatan ahile athisan agaphong doh-ui.
Ahivangin Paul akumlhan achungah abongin, apomin, “Lungdong hih-in, anuhkai nalainai,” ati.
Chuin Paul akaltou kit’in changlhah ahehbal in anen, sottah khovah geiyin ajah-uva thu aseiyin ahoulim in chuti chun akipatdohtai.
Chuin amahon gollhangpa chu ahingin ahinpuiyun, lungmon mainah-in alungmong tapouve.
Chuin keiho kong lama chu kanache masauvin Paul lalutpa dingin Assos jonin kongin kakitol tauve; aman akenga che agot jeh-a aman chutia chu agontohsa ahi.
Chuin Assos khoa eikisuhtopi phat’un, konga kalalut’un Mitylene twikol jonin kahung tauve.
Chuin chua kon chun kakitolun akit nin Chios jon kalhungun, anikit nin Samos kajot pauvin akit nin Miletus kalhung tauve.
Ajeh chu Paul in Asia gama umsot ding anop lou jeh-a, konga kitola Ephesus khopi chu jotpai ding lunga agot jingsa mong ahi, ahitheile Jerusalem a Pentecost mang dinga, kin loiya che kigoa ahi.
Chuin Miletus a kon chun Ephesus a mi asolin Houbung upaho agakou sah-e.
Chuin aheng ahung lhun phat’un ajah uva, “Keima Asia gama kahungtila pat, nangho koma kaum lai sungsea kaumchan chu naheuve.
Lungnem tahle mitlhi pumin chule Juda hon eichanlhih jinguva kona kachunga chua thoh hesoh pumin Pakai lhacha na katongin;
chule phatchomna ding thil imacha nangho dinga kaim beihelin kavetsah sohkeiyun jalhanga le aintinah kahil jiuvin,
Juda ho hengle, Greek miho henga jong, Pathen lama lunghei thule i-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa lam tahsan dingdol kahetsah jin ahi.
Chule tun, veuvin, lhagaova kisoma Jerusalem a chedinga kahi, chua chu kachunga ipi alhun ding kahepoi;
kikanle hesoh gentheiyin eingah jinge, ti Lhagao Thengin khotina eihetsah jingbou hi kahei.
Ahivangin kalhai tetna le Pathen lungsetna Pakai Jesua kona kamu kalhacha natoh Kipana Thupha hettohsah ding hi kachai molsoh poule kahinkho jong hi kaitchapoi.
Chule Pathen thu kaseilea nangho hin kamai namu kitlou dingu ahi, ti hi kahei.
Hiche jeh a chu mi jouse thisana kona ngima kahi, ti tunia kahetsah nahiuve;
ijeh-inem itile Pathen thil ngaito jouse najah-uva im kanei aumpoi.
Hijeh chun Pathen in athisana achohsa Houbung vah dinga achinguva Lhagao Thengin napansah-u, kelngoi hon chengse chungle nangmaho chungchang ah chingtheiyun.
Kache nungle ngei gilou nalahuva alut’a ahon hi ahoilou ding kahei;
chule nangho lah a kona jong abang bang potdoh-a amaho nung chu ajuina dinga aloilutna dinguva, thu akaleh-a hila hung um ding ahi, hiche jong hi kahei.
Hijeh chun nangho kigingpha jingun; chule keiman kum thum sunga mitlhi puma asun ajana nangho nabon chauva tilkhou kahai louhel chu geldoh jingun,
chule nangho sadoh-a khantousah theiya, chule mi akisuthengho lah-a nangho gou chansah theiya, Pathenle alungsetna thua kakhumu nahiuve.
Koimacha dangka, sana, nihchen ponsil kadeichapoi.
Kakhut teni hin keima le kaloiho ngaichat chan kaboldohjin, hichu naheuve.

Keiman ijakaiya navet tohuva natho dingu kavetsah sohkeiye; nanghon chutobanga chu natoh gimuva, chatmoho phatna nabol dingu thu ahi, ‘Lah sangin peh ochat aumjoi,’ tia Pakai tah-in asei jong chu nageldoh dingu thu ahi,” ati.
Thu hicheng chu aseiyin adilsun abonchauvin ataopitai.
Chuin abonchauvin hakan akap’un Paul angong koiyun, achop’un,
Kamai namu kit lou dingu ahi, ati chu, hiche jeh tah chun alungse deh-un; kong mun geiyin agathah tauve.
Chuin keiho amaho toh kakikhenun kongin kakitolun jangkeiyin Cos twikol kalhungun, akitnin Rhodes twikol kalhungun; chua konin kache paiyun Patara kho kalhungui;
chuin Phoenicia gama kai ding kong khat kamuvin achunga kachongun kakitol tauve.
Chuin Cyprus twikol akimu phat’in veilam ngan kapelun Syria gama kache paiyun, konga thil solhah ding aum jeh-in Tyre khoa kakingauve.
Chukom muna um seijuiho kaholdoh-un, chukomah nisagi kanichongui; amaho chun lhagaovin, Paul chu Jerusalem a che hihhen, atiuve.

Chuin ni hijat chu kaum jouvun kakipatdoh-un kachena dingu kamasot tauve; chuin amaho chu a bonchauvin ajiteule achateu pumin khopi kulpam geiyin eihung thah-ui; chuin twikhanglen kama kadilsuvin kataovun, kakilha tauvin,
keiho konga kakaltauve; amaho vang chu ain lamuva akile kittauve.
Chuin keiho Tyre a konin kacheuvin Ptolemais kalhungun, twiya kacheu kachaiyui; chuin sopiho salam kaboh-un, amaho komah ni khat kaumui.
Ajingin chua konin kakipatdoh-un, Caesarea kalhungun; sagiho lah a Kipana Thupha seilea, Philip, ama ina chun kalhungun amatoh kaumtauve.
Ama chun chanu li aneiyin, nungah theng ahiuvin Pathen thu seiphonga pang ahiuve.
Chukoma chu ni ijat-ham kaumun, Judah gama konin amin Agabus atiu themgao khat ahungin ahi.

Ama chu kahenguva ahungin Paul konggah chu alan akhut akeng akikanin, “Lhagao Thengin hiti hin aseiye, ‘Hiche konggah neipa hi Jerusalem a Juda hon hitia hi akanuva chidang namdang ho khut’a apehdoh dingu ahi,’ ahung ti.
Hiche thu chu kajauvin chukoma umhole keihon Paul Jerusalem a che lou dingin kajoltauve.
Chuin aman eidonbut’un, “Nanghon ibola neika kauva kalung nasuhset’uham? Ijeh-inem itile Jerusalem a kikan ding keogoh hilouva, Pakai Jesu min jala thi dinga jong kigosadema um kahi,” ati.
Aman keiho thu alah lou jeh-in kathiptauvin, “Pakai lunggot got hihen,” katitauve.
Chujouvin kathil keovu kakigot’un Jerusalem a kache tou tauve.
Chule Caesarea a konin seijui koi koihamin eijuiyun; amaho chun amin Mnason, Cyprus twikola seijui lui, lhunna a kanei dingpau chu ahinpuiyui.
Jerusalem kagalhunule sopihon kipahtah-in einasangui.
Akit nin Paul keihotoh Jacob henga kalut’ui; chua chun Houbung upaho jouse jong abonchauvin aumui.
Chuin Paul’in amaho chu salam aboh jouvin alhacha natonga amana Pathen in chidang namdangho lah a thil abolsah jouse chu abanchan aseitai.
Chuin sopihon thu hicheng chu ajah un Pathen avahchoiyun; chuin Paul jah-a, “Sopi, Judaho lah-a atahsan sang tamtah ahi hi namui; chule amaho khu danthu lama gunchutah ahiuve.

Ahin amahon nangma thudol, nangma hin chidang namdangho lah-a Juda ho chu Mose danthu pailhah ding thu nahil in, chapang chep atanlou dingu, chule chonna dan ngaiya chonlou ding tin, nahillei ti ajauve.
Hijeh a chu iti ding hitam? Nangma hi ahungtai tila ajah tei dingu ahi.
Hijeh chun thu khat seipeh-unge, hichu bolin; kitepna neiya mi li hikoma hin kaneiyui;

amaho chu puiyin lang nangmatoh kisuthengun, chule asam vona dingu nangman sum toh-in: chutile nangma thudola athu jah-u chu ima hilou ahi, nangmatah chonna dan ngaiya nachon chu amahon ahetsoh dingu ahi.
Chidang namdangho atahsanho thudol vang, milim houna thil neh, thi neh, akimehlihtho ganhing sa neh, chule jonthanhoiya kona akikang sena dinguva, keihon kasut’uva kathot sau ahitai,” atiuve.
Chutah-in Paul’in miho chu apuiyin akit nin amaho chutoh akisuthengun, hou inah alut’un, amaho khat cheh dinga sa kithat apehpeh kahsea akisuh thengna dingu ni kichaina ding chu thempu agahet sahtai.
Chuin ni sagi chu alhin ding kon-chan Asia gama Juda ho chun hou-in sunga Paul amu phat’un, mipichu abon-chan atilseuvin ama chu amanun,

Israel miho, neihuvin; hichepa hi ahi, gamtina mijouse henga, Judah mite le, danthu, chule hiche mun seiselea; chule chuche jeng hilouvin hou-inah Greek mi alut pin, hiche intheng hi asuboh-e,” tin asamtauve.
Hichu masanga khopi sunga Ephesus mi Trophimus toh amuva ahile, Paul in ama chu hou-ina alutpia angaitou ahi.
Chuin akhothing in akiloh jengun miho chu alhai khomun; Paul chu amanun, hou-ina konin akaidoh-un; kotkhahho chu akhah-pai jengui.
Chuin ama chu tha dinga agot laitah-un, Jerusalem khopia mi jouse aboiye ti thu sepai vaipipo heng alhungtai.
Chuin ama chun sepaiho le sepai ja lamkaiho apuiyin ahenguva alhaisuh tauve; chuin sepai vaipipo le sepaiho chu amu phat’un, Paul avoh-u chu atangui.
Chuin sepai vaipipo chun ahinnaiyin Paul chu atuh-in, thihkhao nia kan dingin thu apen; koiham ipi susea ham, tin adongtai.
Chuin mipi lah a chun kimkhat’in thuchom asamin, adang kim-khat’in thuchom asamui; chuin navai aum jeh chun aje ajang aheta hih-in kulpi sunga puilut ding thu apetai.
Chuin Paul kalbilei ageiyin mipin abol nasat behseh jeh chun sepaihon ama chu adom-peh jengui;
ajeh chu mihonpi chun, “Sumangin, sumangin” tin asamun ajui lellul jengui.
Chuin Paul kulpi sunga apui lut ding konun aman sepai vaipipo jah-a chun, “Najah a thu themkhat seitheiyingem,” ati. Chuin aman, Greek pao nahet’-em?
Masang laiya miho tilsea mihem khat mi sang li gamthip’a loidoh a Egypt gam mi chu nahi louham?” ati.
Ahinla Paul in, “Keima Cilicia gama Tarsus khopia Judah mi kahi, khopi mai maiya mi kahipoi, chule nahenga katao ahi, miho jaha thu kaseina ding thu neipen,” ati.
Chuin aman athusei ding aphalpeh phat’in Paul leikalbi chunga chun adingin miho chu akhut’in ajap’in chuin athipchet phat’un, ajah-uva chun Hebrew paovin thu aseiyin:
“Sopite le pate ho, tua kakihonna thu kasei ding hi ngaiyun,” ati.
Chuin aman ajah-uva Hebrew paova thu asei ajah phat’un, ahathip cheh tauvin ahile, aman,

“Keima Judah mi, Cilicia gama Tarsus khopia penga, hiche khopi sunga hi Gamaliel khophang bula seilena iputeu ipateu chonna dan kikheltah dungjuiya kihildoh-a Pathen lama gunchutah, tunia nangho bang hi kahi;
chule hiche Lam miho thina geiyin kabolsen anumei apasalin kakanin songkula kakhumjin ahi.

Chujongle thempu chungnungle gamsung upaho jousen jong hiche thu chu eihetpiuve; amahoa kon chun sopiho henga dingin lekha kalan Damascus a um jouse talen peh dingin kana Jerusalem a hintol dingin, kachen ahi.
“Chuin ahitin ahi, kachele Damascus khokom kageiyin sunkim dontah-in phulou helouvin vana kon vah nasatah khat’in kavel ahinsalvah soh jenge.
Hichun keima tolah kalhutai, chuin kajah-a, ‘Saul, Saul nangin ibola keima eibolsea nahim?’ tia seiya aw khat kajai.
Chuin keiman kadonbut’in, ‘Nang koi nahim, Pakai?’ kati. Chuin aman kajah-a, ‘Keima nabolset jing Nazareth Jesu kahi,’ ati.
Chuin kalhonpiho chun vah chu amunauvin, kajah-a thusei aw vang chu ajapouve.
Chuin keiman, ‘I-katidingham, Pakai?’ kati. Chuin Pakai chun kajah-a, ‘Thoudoh-in Damascus khoa lut’in; chukoma chu nabol dinga kigo jouse aboncha kiseipeh ding nahi,’ eiti.
Chuin vah loupi jeh a chu kho kamu lou phat’in kalhonpi hon khut’in eikaiyun Damascus kho kaluttai.
“Chuin mi khat Anamas, danthu dungjuiya Pathen ngaisah chule chukoma cheng Juda ho jouse seiphat chu, kahenga ahungin, kakoma adingin kajah-a,
‘Sopi Saul, kho mutan,’ eiti. Chuin hiche pettah chun ama chu kamutan ahi.
Chuin aman, ‘Ipateu Pathen in Ama lunggot lam he dingle michondih tah chu mua, akam sung kon aw ja dinga, napansah ahitai.
Ijeh-inem itile nangman namu le najah thua chu mi jouse hettohsah-a napan ding ahi.
Chule ipi tua nakhongai ham? Kipatdoh-in lang baptize changin aminin taovin, nachonset kisoplhah-in,’ eiti.
“Chuin ahitin ahi, Jerusalem a kakile kit phat’in hou-in sunga kataole kagaochang tai;
chuin, ‘Gangin, chule Jerusalem a konin potdoh loiyin; ijeh-inem itile amahon keima thudola nangma thuhil alah lou dingu ahi,’ tia kajah a thuseiya chu kamui.
Chuin keiman, ‘Pakai amahotah-in nangma tahsanho songkula kakhuma kikhopna in tina kavohji chu aheuve,
chule nathu hettohsah Stephen, thisan aso pettah-uva jong akoma kadina kaphatsah-a athatteho ponho kanachin chu,’ kati.
Chuin aman kajah-a, ‘Kipatdoh-in chen, Keiman nangma gamlatah a chidang namdang ho henga kasoljoh ding nahi,’ eititai,” ati.
Chuin chuche thu gei chun angaiyun, chuin aw sangtah-in, “Hitobang mi hi vannoi leiset’a konin sumangin, ahinga umhoi ahipoi,” atitauve.
Chuin kho asamun, apon alehlhau vin apaiyun leivui vanah akitundohsah jengun ahile,
sepai vaipipo chun ama chu kulpi sunga puilut dingthu apen, achunga chutobang tah-a akhosap’u chu ajeh hetdohna dingin, jep’a patep dingin asoltai.
Chuin savun khaova akantah phat’un, Paul in akoma ding sepai jalamkai jah-a chun, “Themmosahna beiya Rome mi jepna ding dan ngaiya thu naneiyem?” ati.
Sepai jalamkai chun thu hichu ajah phat’in sepai vaipipo henga chun agachen, “Ipi bol ding kigo nahim? Mipa khu Rome mi ahi,” ati.
Chuin sepai vaipipo chu ahungin ajah-a, “Rome mi nahim? Neiseipeh-in,” atile aman, “Kahi,” ati.
Chuin sepai vaipipo chun, “Keiman sum tamtah kapeh a Rome mi hina hi kachan ahibouve,” ati. Chuin Paul’in, “Keivang ahisa penga kahi,” ati.
Chutah-in athem amo hetdohna a bolgim dinga kigosadem ho chu hiche pettah chun akoma konin ache mangtauve; chule sepai vaipipo chun Rome mi ahi ahedoh-in, amatah-in akansah jeh chun akichatai.
Akit nin Juda hon Paul ahehnau thu chu hetchenna dingin sepai vaipipo chun ama chu alhamin, thempu pipuiho le houvaipoloi aboncha kikhom dingin thu apen. Paul ahin puilhan aanguvah adinsahtai.
Chuin Paul in houvaipoiloi chu ave changmel in, “Sopiteho, tuni geiya hi imalam jousea ase apha hekah sohkeiya Pathen anga lung thengsela um kahi,” ati
Ananias thempu chungnungin akoma dingpa chu akam bengin asole.
Chutah-in Paul in ajah-a, “Vo bang kiloibang, Pathen in nang nadenjoh ding ahi; nangma dan ngaitah a kathu tan dinga touva chuche dan chu napal lhah-a kei deng dinga mi nasolem?” ati.
Chuin akoma dinghon, “Nangman Pathen thempu chungnung chutia chu nahouset ong?” atiuve.
Chuin Paul in, “Sopite, thempu chungnung ahilam kahetlou ahi, ijehinem itile, ‘Nangin namite chunga vaipo chunga thuse sei hih-in,’ tin akisune.” ati.

Ahivangin Paul in amaho chu keh khat Sadducee ahia keh khat Pharisee ahi ahet phat’in, houvaipoloi lah-a chun asamin. “Sopite, keima Pharisee chapa, Pharisee kahi; athiho thodoh kit kinep thua ka thu kibola ahi,” ati.
Chuin thu hiche chu asei phat chun Pharisee hole Sadducee ho akinelun, mipi chu akilangkhen tauve.
Ajeh chu Sadducee ho chun thokit, Vantil, chule lhagao hicheng chu aumpoi, atiu ahin. Pharisee ho vang hicheng chu aume tia aoiyu ahi.

Hitichun apoh vengvung jengun; chuin Pharisee mi danthu sunho phabep adingdoh-un, anelun. “Keihon hichepa agitlouna imacha kamupouve; lhagaovin ahim, Vantil ahim in, ajah a thu asei hikhat hihdem?” atiuve.
Chuin hachang nela akinel phat’un, amaho chun Paul chu sattel unte tin sepai vaipipo chu akichan, kumlhasuh a alah-uva kona lahpeh a kulpi sunga puilut dingin sepaiho chu asoltai.
Chuin hiche jan chun Pakai akoma adingin, “Kicha hih-in; ijeh-inem itile Jerusalem a keima thudol nahettohsah banga hi Rome khopia jong nahettohseh ding ahi,” ati.
Chuin khovah phat’in Juda ho akihou somun Paul itha masangseuvin anneh twidon bolpou hite tin kihahselin akihan lhotauve.
Chutia miphil dinga kihou soma chu mi somli val ahiuve.
Chuin amaho chu thempu pipuiho le upaho henga acheuvin. “Keiho kihahsel khoh tah a kakihahsel uva Paul katha masang seuva imacha tep louhel dinga kihanlhoa kahitauve.

Hiche jeh chun tun nangho houvaipoloi toh athudol chu kichen cheh a hettoh-a bolphat ding ngaitoveh kisanvin nahenguva ahin puina dingin, sepai vaipipo henga kilangin seiyin; aman nangho kom ahinphah kah-a that dinga kigosadema um kahiuve,” agatiuve.
Chuin achanlhih-u thu chu Paul sopinu chapan ajan, ahungin kulpi sunga chun alut’in Paul jah-a ahung seitai.
Chuin Paul in sepai jalamkaiho khat ahenga akouvin. “Hiche gollhang hi sepai vaipipo henga puiyin; ajah-a seinom khat aneiye,” ati.
Chuin aman apuiyin sepai vaipipo henga achen, “Hiche gollhang hin najah-a seinom aneiye tin, sohchang Paul in eikouvin nangma henga hin puiyin eiti,” tin agaseiye.
Chuti chun aman akhut’in atuh-in achoma apuidoh-in guhthimin adongin. “Kajah-a sei ding ipi thu naneiyem?” ati.
Chuin aman, “Nangman Paul thudol hi kichen cheh-a dohtoh-a nabolphat ding banga, jingle houvaipoloi kikhopnaa napuina dinga thum ding, tin Juda ho akiloltauve.

Hijeh chun nangman amaho thu la hih-in; Ijeh-inem itile mi somli valin, Paul itha masangseuvin anneh twidon bolpouhite, tin akihahselun, achanglhi jingui, chule tua hi kigosadema uma nangma thupeh mai ngah jinga um ahiuve,” ati.
Chuti chun sepai vaipipo chun gollhangpa chu ahilchah-in, “Kajah a naphondoh thu hicheng hi koima jah-a sei hih-in,” atin alhadohtai.
Chuin aman sepaijalamkai ni ahenga akouvin hiche thu hi apei, “Jan nidan koa Caesarea a che ding akenga che sepai jani, sakol sepai somsagi chule tengchoi sepai jani gotsan koiyun;
chule Paul Felix gamvaipo heng bitkeiya pui lhungna dingin ama tousahna ding sa jong gotsademin koiyun,” ati.
Ahin lekha hitin asune:
“Lal chungnung pen Felix gamvaipo, Claudius Lysias-in salam kahinboh-e.
Juda hon hiche mipa hi amanun atha ding konun keima seipai hotoh kakonin, ama hi Rome mi ahi, ti kahen kahuhdoh tai.
Chuin ipi jeh-a aheh-u ahi ahehnau hetdohna dingin houvaipoloi kikhopnaa kapuiye.
Hia chun thina theihoile kikanna theihoi thudolin ahehpouve, amaho chonna dan thua asuhkhel amat doh-u ahitoh-e.
Ama hi phil dinga agot’uva achanlhih-u kahetdoh phat’a khongai louhela a pet tah-a nangma henga kahin solpai jeng ahi, chule ahehho jong nangma ang sunga ahehnau thu sei dingin thu kapei.
Chuin sepaihon thupeh dungjui chun ajan janin Paul chu apuiyun Antipatris lama achepitauve.
Ahin ajingin sakol sepaiho chu amatoh alhonsah-un, amaho kulpi lama akiletauve.
Chuin amaho Caesarea alhunun lekha chu gamvaipo chu apeuvin Paul jong chu adinsah tauve.
Chuin aman lekha chu asimin, “Hoi gampoh mi nahim?” tin adongin, chuin Cilicia gam mi ahi ahetdoh phat’in,
“Nahehho jong ahung tengule nathu ngainange.” ati. Chuin Herod inpia koi dingin thu apetan ahi.
Chuin ni nga jouvin thempu chung nung Ananias upaho phabep toh chule Tertullus atiu thukalthem khattoh acheuvin, Paul ahehnau thu chu gamvaipo jah-a chun aseiyui.
Chuin Paul agakouvun ahile, Tertullus in ahehnan achunga thu aseipanin. “Vo lal chungnung pen Felix, nangma vangin lungmon chungnungin kalung amongui:
chule nangma vaihom them vangin hiche nam mite hi imalam jousea phatdoh sah-in aumun. hiche jeh hin aimatih chan in hoikom hoikoma jong lung kipahtah-in kasangui.
Ahivangin thu tamtah seiya nangma suh lungjing ding kanompoi, nangman neilungset’un, kathu u paltana kaseiyu hi neingaipeh-un.
Ijeh-inem itile keihon hichepa hi mi sugam, chule vannoi leiset chung jousea Juda ho lah-a vaipi chohsea, chule Nazareth chona chonho lamkai pipu ahi kamandoh-un;
chumale hou inma suhboh dinga agot jeh-a kamat’u ahi. *[6
Ahin sepai lamkai Lysias hunga thahat sana kakhut’uva kona ahung lah mang ahi.
Ahehho na-ang a ding dingin thu apen.] Nangman dongtoh le chun kahehnau hi adih adihlou adihlou abonchan hesoh keinan nate,” tai.
Chuin Juda ho jong chun ajomun. “Hicheng chu ahicheh-e.” atiuve.
Chuin gamvaipo chun thu sei dinga Paul akhasuh phat’in Paul in adonbut’in. “Kum sottah nangma hiche nam mite thutana panga nahitan hichu kahen, lung kipahtah-in kakihonna thu seiyinge:
nangman henan natin, Pathen hou dinga Jerusalem a kache hi ni somle nini aval hihlaiye:
hou-in sunga mi khat toutoh kakinel ahiloule kikhopnale kho sunga mihonpi katilsetna imacha eimupouve.
Tua eihehnau chengse jong chu aphotchenna hiche ahi ati theipouve.

Ahin keiman nangma jah-a kaseidoh hiche hi ahi, amahon houdan chom asah-u Lam dungjuiya keiman kaputeu kapateu Pathen chu kahouva, danthu le themgao ho lekhabua kisun dungjuiya chu thil jouse katahsana,
amaho jongin michondih jong michondih lou jong thokit um ding ahi, tia akat jingu hitiho chu keiman Pathen lama kinepna kanei ahi;
hiche jeh-a chu Pathen le mihem lama suhkhel beiya ase apha hetkahna neiya um dinga aimatih chana kihabol jing kahi.
Chuin kum tamtah nunga kanam vaipiu min ahunau ti pehle thilkat hinpoa hunga kahin:
hichea chun mihon hou inah kakisuhtheng eimuve: mihonpitoh jong kaumpoi, chule thunoh baotam imacha jong aumpoi; ahin Asia gama Juda ho koi koiham ahibovui:
amaho chu hikoma nangma anga hin umuhen, kachunga thu eihehna ding aneiyule hiding ahi.
Ahiloule hitoho hin seiyuhen, houvaipoloi anga kadina chu kasuhkhel ipi amatdoh-um.
alah-uva kadina kho kasap’a, ‘Athiho thokit thua tunia na ang sunguva eikikouva eikidonga ahitai, tia kasei tailou chu” ati.
Ahivangin Felix-in chuche Lam thudol chu ahetchet jeh-in athu tan ding chu akhongaiyin. “Lysias sepai vaipipo ahung tengle nathu u ngaito chennange,” ati.
Chuin aman angah-a koiya chule anoma umsah-a chule ajenle ding, agol apaiho jong kham lou ding tin sepai jalamkai chu thu apetai.
Chuin ni ijat-ham jouvin Felix chu ainneipi Judah numei Drusilla toh ahungin Paul agakousah-in, Christa Jesu tahsan thudol asei chu angaiyin ahi.
Chuin aman chondihna, kitim them chule khonunga hung lhung ding thupi kitan thudol asei phat’in Felix atijajahtan, adonbut’in. “Tun chetan; keiman kaon phatle nangma hung kousah nange.” ati.
Chujongle Paul chun sum eipente, tin phi veng vungin akousah-in ahoulimpi jin ahi.
Ahivangin kum ni sungin, Porcius Festus-in Felix panmun chu ahin kheltai: hichun Felix chun Juda ho deiya um ding ngaito nan Paul chu akanin adalhatai.
Festus chuche gamkai sunga ahung lhun ni thum jouvin Cacsarea a konin Jerusalem a achetoutai.
Chuin thempuiho le Judah miho pipuhon Paul chungah ajah-a thu anaseiyun:
chule lampia anachan lhih-uva anatha theina dingu lungthim ngaiton, ama chunga chu amaho alungset’uva Paul chu Jerusalem a ahinpuina dingin ataovun ahi.
Ahivangin Festus-in adonbut’in, “Paul Caesarea a kikoiya ahi, chule keima khu lama chevah ding kahi.
Hijeh chun ama khun suhkhel anei ahile, nalah-uva athahat athunei chengse keimatoh kilhonin hungsuh-uhen, hung hehtauhen.” ati.
Chuin amaho lah-a ni get ahim ni som ahim kalval nichong louvin Caesarea a chesuh paiyin, akit nin thutanna a atouvin. Paul gapui dingin thu apetai.
Chuin ama ahung lhun phat’in Jerusalem a kona hungsuh Juda ho a kim vela adingun, achungah thu gilou tamtah aseiyun setahtah-in aheh jengjui, ahivanginla aphotchenna avetsah theipouve.
Chuin Paul in ama kihonna thu aseiyin. “Juda ho danthu ahin, hou-in ahin, ahiloule Caesar douna ahin, keiman imacha kasuhset kasuhkhel aumpoi,” ati.
Ahivangin Festus chun Juda ho deiya um ding angaiton, adonbut’in Paul jah-a, “Nangma Jerusalem a chetouva khukoma keima ang sunga hicheng thudol hi ngaitoa um ding nanop’em?” ati.
Ahinla Paul in, “Keima kathu kitanna ding dol Caesar thutanna anga dinga kahi. Keiman Juda ho ima kasusepoi, nangman jong nahe sohkeinai.

Chutia akhang gilou kahia thina theiloma suhset nei kahile, thi ding kadapoi; amavang hicheng eihehna chengseu hi tahbeh ahiloule koiman amaho khut a eipedoh theiponte. Caesar henga appeal kabole,” ati.
Chutah-in Festus in vaibol chengse toh akihoutoh phat’in adonbut’in. “Nangman Caesar henga appeal nabol ahitan. Caesar heng monga nache ding ahi,” ati.
Chuin ni ijat-ham jouvin Agrippa lengle Bernice, Caesarea a ahung lhung lhonin Festus chu salam ahung boh lhone.
Chuin chua sottah anichong lhonin ahile, Festus-in lengpa jah-a chun Paul thu umchan aseiyin, “Felix dalhah sohchang kihen khat aumin,
ama chu Jerusalem a kaum pet’in thempu pipuiho le Juda ho upahon athu eihetsah-un athu tana chai dingin kahenga athumui.
Akihehpa le ahehho kimaitoa akihonna thule ahehnau thudol seina neisah masanga, mi koi hile pehdoh chu Rome mi chonna ngai ahipoi tia amaho chu kana donbut ahi;
chuin amaho hikoma ahung kikhom un ahile, kei jong chomkhat cha jong geisang louvin akit nilelen thutanna a katouvin amapa chu kaga kousahtai.
Chuin ahehho chu akim vela adingun, akhan gitlouna thun heh-unte, tia kaginchat bang chu achunga thukhoh imacha aseipouve;
amaho hou thudol le Paul in, ahingin aume, ati Jesu atiu mithisa khat thudola kinel ahibovui.
Chuin chutobang thu chu atannaje kahevah hih-in, Jerusalem a chea chuche athu chu tanding anop anop lou kadongin ahi.
Ahinla Paul in leng chungnung tandinga akikoina dinga appeal abol phat’in, Caesar henga kasol thei ding kahsea koi dingin thu kapetai,” ati.
Chuin Agrippa’n Festus jah-a, “Kei jong keimatah-in hichepa thu chu jaleng kalung ahi,” ati. Aman, “Jingle janaveh ta chun,” ati.
Chuti chun ajingin Agrippa Bernice toh loupitah a ahunga thu ngaina inpia vaipipoho toh khopi sunga miho pipu chengse toh ahunglut phat lhonin, Festus thusah-in Paul chu ahinpui luttauve.
Chuin Festus-in, “Lengpa Agrippa chule hikoma kaumpi mi jousen, hichepa hi namuve, ama hi Judah mihonpin Jerusalem a jong hikoma jong kahenga aheh-un, ahinga umhoi ahitapoi, tin asamui.
Ahivangin athina theilom ima akhan gitlouna keiman kamudoh poi; chule aman leng chungnung henga appeal abol jeh-in sol dinga kagot ahi.

Ahin achungchang thudol kapakai henga gahsut ding thu kichentah ima kaneipoi. Hiche jeh-a chu na-anguva, vo Agrippa lengpa, nangma ang sungtah-a kahin puidoh ahi, ijem tia athu dohtoh nunga sut dingthem kanei theina dinga.
Ijeh inem itile akihehna thu sun louva sohchang gahsol chu kitoh kasapoi,” ati.
Chuin Agrippa’n Paul jah-a, “Nakihonna thu sei theiyin nate,” ati. Chutah-in Paul in aban ajah-in, akihonna thu aseiyin,
“Lengpa Agrippa, Juda hon eihehna jouseu thua tunia nangma anga kakihonna thu seidinga kaum hi lungnom kakisa lheh jenge,
ajeh pen chu nangman Juda ho lah-a chonna danle kinelna thunoh jouse nahet sohkeiya nathemsoh jeh chu ahi; hijeh chun khongai themin kathu ngaiyin, tia katao ahi.
“Kachapan laiya pat’a kanam mite lah-a chule Jerusalem a kanunchan chu Juda hon ahe sohkeiyui;
atila pat’a ahet sohkeisau ahi jeh chun kahoudanuva chondan Pharisee chona kachon chu sei nomleu asei thei dingu ahi.
Chule tua hi kaputeu kapateu Pathen in athutep chu kineppijeh-a athu kitan dinga hikoma ding kahi;
hiche thutep chu mu ding kinema phung somle phung ni hin gunchutah-a asun ajana Pathen ahouvu ahi; hiche kinepna jeh-a chu Judah on eiheh-u ahi, lengpa!
Pathen in athiho akaithoule ibola nanghon tahsan umlouva nangaitou ham?
“Keiman jong Nazareth Jesu min douna hin thil tamtah akaleh-a bol ding ahi, tin kangaiton ahi.
Chule hichu Jerusalem a bol jong kabolin, chule thempu pipuihoa konin thuneina kamun mithengho tamtah songkula kakhumin, chule athau jong chun kaphasah-in ahi.
Chule kikhopna in jousea talen kape jingjin engsanin kataitomsah-in achunguva chun kalungsa tuntun jengin migam dang khopi gei sanin kabolsen ahi.
“Hiti chun thempu pipuihoa kona thuneinale eisolnau lekha kamun, Damascus lama kachen ahi;
hichun, vo lengpa, sun kimtah-in lampia chun vana kon vah khat nisa sanga vahjo kamun, hichun kakimvelle kalhonpiho chengse asalvah soh jenge.
Chuin tola kalhuh gam phat’un keiman Hebrew paova kajah-a, ‘Saul, Saul ibola nangin neibolset jingham? Nang dingin thihtul monghem lho ahahsai,’ eitia aw khat kajai.
Chuin keiman, ‘Pakai Nang koi nahim?’ katile. Pakai chun, ‘Keima nabolset jing Jesu kahi.

Ahivangin thouvin chule nakengin pansan dingin; nangman thil namusa chengse le khonunga nahenga kahung kilah tenga dinga chengsea kathu hettohsah dingle kalhachaa pansah dinga, hiche dinga chu nahenga kahung kilah kahi;
kamitehoa konle chidang namdang hoa kona kahuhdoh ding nahi;

amit’u hadohsah dingle muthim lah-a kona khovah-a, chule satan thuneina noiya aumuva kona Pathen henga akihei theina dingule, achonsetnau akisuhbeiya, keima eitahsan vanga kisuthengho lah-a gou alo theina dinguva ahenguva kasol ding nahi,’ eiti.
“Hijeh chun, vo lengpa Agrippa, keima vantil kamu thua chu nung louvin kaumpoi;

ahin amasan Damascus a umho jah-a, chuin Jerusalem ah, chule Judah gam pumpiale, chi dang namdangho henga jong, lung aheiyuva Pathen lama akiheiyuva lungheitoh kilom thil abolna dingun kaseiphong letan ahi.
Hijeh a chu Juda hon hou-in sunga eimat’uva tha dinga eigot’u ahi.
Pathena kona huna kanei jeh-a tuni geiya kadina, alen aneo kahetsah ahi, thu dang ima kaseipoi, themgao ho le Mose’n, hung ding ahi, tia aseiyu,
Christa chun gim genthei athoh tei dingje, athiho lah-a thoudoh kit amasa pen ahia; amite le chidang namdangho henga vah aphondoh dingje, kaseibou chu ahi,” ati.
Aman chutia akihonna thu aseiya adonbut chun, Festus chun aw sangtah-in. “Vo Paul, angola nahi; nalekha them sangin nasuhngol ahitai,” ati.
Ahin Paul in, “Vo michungnung Festus angola kahipoi; thudih tahle chihna thu kaseijoh ahibouve.
Ijeh-inem itile lengpan jong hiche thudol hi ahei; hijeh-a chu ama ang sunga ngamtah-a kasei ahi; ajeh chu hiche hi ningkoiya kibol ahiloujeh-in ama jah a kiima imacha aumpoi chentahin kahei.
Leng Agrippa, themgao ho thu hi natahsah am? Natahsane ti kahei,” ati.
Chuin Agrippan Paul jah-a, “Thu themcha jollhah-a Christian hisah ding neigoi,” ati,
Chuin Paul in “Thu themchan hihen, thu tampin hile, nangma chang hilouvin, tunia kathusei ja jouse hi kakikan naho tailou hin, abonchan keimatoh bangleu ti Pathen henga kathume,” ati.
Chuin lengpatoh gamvaipo chutoh chule Bernice toh akomuva touho chengse chutoh akipatdoh-un,
chuin achoma acheuvin akihouvun. “Hichepa hin thina hoile kanna dingdol thil ima asuhkhel aumpoi,” atiuve.
Chuin Agrippan Festus jah-a, “Hichepa hi, aman Caesar henga appeal abol lou hile, lhadoh thei ahi,” ati.
Chuin konga kitola Italy gama kache dingu thu akichet phat’in Augustus sepai loi lah-a Julius atiu sepai jalamkai khut’ah Paul le sohchang dangho apedoh tauve.
Chuin Asia gamkolvel muntina kitol dinga kigo Adramyttium-ah konga kalut’un kakitol tauve; chule Macedonia gama Thessalonica mi Aristarchus jong chutoh kalhonui.
Akit nin Sidon khoah kong kangauve. Julius-in Paul alungset’in agol apaiho henga chea gakithado dingin thu apen asole.
Chuin chua kon chun twi chunga kacheuvin, hui akale lama anun jeh-in Cyprus twikol le lam lamah kakitol tauve.
Chuin Cilicia le Pamphylia dep’a twikhanglen kakhel-un Lycia gama Myra khopi kalhungui.
Chukoma chun sepai jalamkai chun Italy gam jon ding Alexandria kong khat amudoh-in, hia chun eikhum tauve.
Chuin sottah olchachan kakitolun hahsatah-in Cnidus jon kagei hamhammui, huiyin einan jeh-un, Crete twikol lea kakitolun, Salmone jon kajot’un;
nahnah-in Kaimunhoi-atiu mun khat kalhungui, akom chu Lasea khopi ahi.
Chuin akisottah behseh jeh, chule konga kitol setto kichat aum jeh chun @9(hichu an ngol kichai jou ahitan)@7. Paul in amaho chu akhamin,
Vo miho hiche twi chunga icheuva hin setto hakamna inei dingu ahi, tin ken kamui; hichu thilkeole kong keo jong hilouvin, eiho ding jengin jong setto kichat aume,” ati.
Ahivangin sepai jalamkai chun Paul thu sangin kong pipu thule akong neipa thu ahajop jotan, ahi.

Chuin phalbia umna dinga kongkai mun chu akijen lou jeh-in, mi atam jon twikhanglena kona chu kitoldoh-a Phoenix chu lhun teiteiya chukoma chu phalbi sunga um ding asomtauvin ahi. Phoenix chu Crete twikol gama kongkai mun khat ahin, lhum sah le lhumlhang angatto ahi.
Chuin lhang hui olcha chan ahung nungin ahile, alunggot bangu hin angaitouvin kong chu alhauvin Crete pam chin chinah atoltauve.
Ahivangin chujou chomkhat jouvin chua kon chun solamhui atiu huipi hattah ahung nungsuhtai;
chuin konga chun ahung chutan ahile, malama atol joutapouvin kamoh lhatauvin ahile, eilhoh eilhoh jeng tauve.
Chuin amin Cauda atiu twikol neocha le-leah kalhaiyun, hahsatah-in kongneo kaman nahnah-un ahi.
Chuin hichu akhaidoh-un ahunan amangun, khaovin kong noi lamah akanbeh tauve; chuin ajole Syrtis kileng lut get’inte, ti akichauvin pondal kikhainaho alalhauvin ahile, eimoh lhoh lhoh tauve.
Chuin huipi chun eisuhgim behsehjeh-u chun akit nin thil apaidoh pantauve.
Anithum nin amahotah-in akhuttah-in kong manchahho chu apaitauvin ahi.
Chuin ni tamtah nisa chule ahsiho eisalvah beihela huipi hat nasatah tang louhela anun anun phat chun, hichea pat chun kihinginte tia kinepna aumtapon ahi.
Chuin ni tamtah an nelouva aum phat’un Paul alah-uva adingin. “Vo miho, nanghon hiche settole hakamna hi to louna dinga kathu nangaiyuva Crete a kona chu kong hi nalha lou dingu thu ahi.
Ahivangin tua jong lungmong tah-a um dinga katil nahiuve; nalah-uva koiman nahinnau nachan lou dingu ahi, kong vang hi mang ding ahi.
Ajeh chu ama a kahia, alhacha a kapan Pathen chua-Vantil tujan chun kakoma adingin.
’Vo Paul, kicha hih-in; Caesar anga nadin tei ding ahi; chule ven, nalhonpiho chengse hi abonchauva Pathen in nang napeh ahitai,’ eiti.
Hiche jeh chun, vo miho, nangho lungmongun; ijeh-inem itile kajah-a asei bang banga chu hung soh tei ding ahi, hitichun Pathen katahsane.
Amavang twikol khat’a ichuh tei dingu ahi,” ati.
Chuin Adria twikhanglena huiyin eisuhtol eitoutolu a jan somle ajanli janin khangkimin kong gamlei kinaiya hitante ti agingchauvin.
hichun twi athuh chu ateule lam som ni atedoh-ui; chuin phabep ache chonun ate kitleuvun ahile lam somle lam nga atedoh-un,
song lah-a kikisunte ti akichauvin, kong tom lamah thihhat li asep lhauvin, khovah angahtauve.
Ahivangin kong miho chu kong mai lama thihhat seplha ding veh akisauvin kongneo twikhanglena adomlhauvin jam ding lungthim aboltauvin ahile.
Paul in sepai jalamkai le sepaiho jah-a, “Amaho khu konga aum louvule nangho changin sohcha thei pouvinate,” ati.
Chu tah-in sepaihon kongkhao chu asattanun twi lah-a alhatauve.
Chuin jing khovah phat’in Paul in miho chu annen asolin. “Tuni ni somle nili ahitai, nanga nangau va an ngola imacha ne louhela naumnau.
Chutichu ahin, annea kasol nahiuve, hichu nakihinso nadinguva phachom ding ahi. Ijeh-inem itile nalu chunguva nasamjangu khatcha jong lou lou ding ahi,” ati.
Hiti chun atin aman changlhah alan mi jouse ang sungah Pathen alhaiyin changlhah ahehbel in ane pantai.
Chutah chun miho jouse chu abonchauvin alung ngamun an anecheh tauve.
Konga uma chu mihing ja nile som sagile gup kahiuve.
Chuin miho chun an anehva phat’un suhlouchang chu twi lah-a apaiyun kong chu asujang tauve.
Chuin khovah phat’in gamlei chu ahetapouve; ahivangin voihanei twininglut khat amudoh-un, ahi theile kong huhnaa chu chukoma chu tol lut ding tin akihou somtauve.
Chuin thihhat-ho alha lhauvin, twikhanglena adalha tauve; chuin hichutoh thakhat’in kongkhe kanna chu alhamlhauvin, hui chena lama kongponjal chu atungdoh-un voiha lam chu ajontauve.
Chuin twikinong ni kisuhtonaa kalut khatauvin ahile kong monghem chu leiya akiphut dentai; chuin kong mai lam chu long louhelin aohdentan, kong neilam chu twikinong chun hasuh-a asuhle akeh pantai.
Chuin sepaihon, sohchangho chu twi jap galkaiya ajama um get’inte, atiuvin tha dingin agotauve.
Ahivangin sepai jalamkai chun Paul chu huhhing agon bol dinga alung got’u chu akhamin, twi jap thei theiyan twi jap galkai hen vapam anakai masa hen;
adang amohse konga um khunpehle thil dang dangin kitol galkai hen, tin thu apetai. Chuti chun abonchauvin bitkeiyin asohchauvin tol alhung tauve.
Chuin kasochat phat’u chun twikol chu Malta akiti ti kaheuve.
Chule paomah hammah ho chun khoto mainah-in eikhoto pouve; hiche pet chu gojuh lai ahin adap jeh chun mei eitipeh un eilhunsah sohkeiyui.
Ahin Paul in thinglom khat achoma meiya chu agahtole meisahul chun gulse khat ahungdoh-in akhut achun akikhaiden jengin ahi.
Chuin paomah hammah ho chun gul khut’a akikhaiden jeng chu amuvin khatle khat akihouvun, “Hichepa hi tolthat mong ahi, twikhanglen a ahuhdoh jeng vangin thudihtanan ahinghoi lousam ahi,” atiuve.
Chuin aman gul chu mei sunga chun athinglhan aima aloupoi.

Ahivangin amaho chun hungpom intin, ahiloule phulou helouvin lhuntin thi ding ahi, tin angah jingun ahi; ahinla sottah angauva avet jouvun aim a alou lou chu amuvin alung gelu akhelun, ama chu pathen ahi, atitauve.
Hiche mun koma chu twikol gam pipu amin Publius atiu chun gam anei ahi; ama chun eila lut’un lung ngaitah-in ni thum aina eilhunsah jengun ahi.
Chuin Publius pa chu khosih le ehthit veiya luma ahin; chuin Paul akoma agalut’in, achunga akhut angamin ataovin adamsah tai.
Chutia abol jou chun chuche twikol gam sunga midang ana nei jouse ahungun ahile adam gamtauve.
Amaho chun eijabol lheh jengui; chuin konga kakitol phat’un kangaichat ding dolchanu thil kongah eihung koipeh-ui.
Chuin lha thum jouvin Alexandria kong phalbi sungsea twikola chu chama amelchihna Ucha Sohkop atiu chun kakitol doh tauve.
Chuin Syracuse ah kakingauvin chukoma chun nithum kaumui.
Chuin chua kon chun kache velkolun Rhegium kalhungui; chuin ni khat jouvin lhanghui anungin ahile akit nin Puteoli kalhung tauve.
Hikoma chun sopiho kamudoh-un, akomuva ni sagi nichong dingin eijolui, chuin chuti chun Rome lam ngan kachetauve.
Chuin chua kon chun sopihon keiho thu ajah phat’un eilam touvin. Appius a Kailhang le Jinglhun in Thum geiyin ahungui; Paul in amaho chu amu phat’in Pathen athangvah-in alung ngamtan ahi.
Chuin Rome khopi kalhun un Paul chu ama changa sepai angahpa chutoh um dingin thu apetauve.

Chuin ahitin ahi, ni thum jouvin Juda ho lah-a apipuho chu akou khomin; chuin amaho ahung kikhop phat’un ajahuva, “Sopiteho, keima inam miteu dounale iputeu ipateu dan dounaa ima kasuhset aum lou vangin, Jerusalem a konin Rome mite khut’a sohchanga pehdoh-kahitai.
Kathem kathemlou aholtoh-un thina hoi ima kachunga amudoh lou jeh-un, lhadoh dingin eigotauvin ahi.
Ahivangin Juda hon hichu anel jeh-un kacham louvin Caesar henga appeal kaboltan ahi; hichu kanam mite hetna dinga ahipoi.
Hiche jeh-a chu nangho toh kimutoa kihoulim dinga kakou nahiuve, ijeh-inem itile Israelte kinepna jeh-a thihkhaova hi kihen kahibouve,” ati.
Chuin amahon ajah-a, “Keihon nangma thudol Judah gama konin lekha kamupouve; chule sopiho lah-a jong koima hikoma ahungin nangma chung changa khan gitlouna thu hunglhut aumpoi.
Ahivangin nangma lung ngaito thudol hi nanga konin kajah nomui; ijeh-inem itile hiche houchom thudol hi gamtina seiset’a aum kaheuve,” atiuve.

Chuin nikho ateppeh-un, aumna a chun ahenga atama tam ahungui; chuin aman jingkah-a pat nilhah geiyin, Mose danthu le themgao ho lekhabua konin thu asodoh-in Pathen gam thu ahettohsah-in, Jesu thudola ajoltan ahi.
Chuin athuseiho chu abangin atahsanun, abangin atahsan pouve.
Chuin amaho le amaho akilol thei lou phat’un Paul in thu khat asei jouvin apotdoh tauve; athusei chu hiche hi ahi; “Lhagao Thengin themgao Isaiah kama naputeu jah-a, asei chu adih lheh jenge.
’Hiche mite henga hin chenlang gaseiyin: Nanghon ja vang janauvin natin, Angainaje nahet lou dingu; Muvang munauvin natin. Nahetdoh lou dingu ahi;

Ijeh-inem itile hiche nam mite hin Amit’uva amu louva. Anauva ajah louva. Alunga jong ahetdoh louva; Chule ahung kihei kit louva. Keiman amaho chu kadamsah louna dingin, Alungu thaovin atomin, Chule akolseh gamun, chule amit asingui,’ tia asei chu.
Hiche jeh chun hiche hi kihet’un, hiche Pathen mihuhhingna hi chidang namdangho henga kisola ahitai; amahon ngai jong angai dingu ahi,” ati.
[Paul’in hicheng asei jou hin Juda hon ada lhau vin hanel’inakinel tauve.]
Chuin aman inman apeh-a achenna a chun kum ni lhingset aumin ahenga hung jouse chu anasangjin.
Pathen gam thu ahil lhangjin, hakattah-in Pakai Jesu Christa thudol ahiljin, koimachan akhampon ahi.
